notes: Pass A (2026-07-01): pip-audit found 30 vulns in 7 system packages. yarn audit: 0 vulns across 1263 npm deps.

cryptography 41.0.7: 9 CVEs. Direct NBI dep but only Fernet/PBKDF2 used (util.py lines 13-15, 318-345). CVEs target PKCS12/RSA/X.509/ECDSA/ECDH/ASN.1/PKCS7 — none reachable through NBI. GHSA-537c-gmf6-5ccf (bundled OpenSSL) is the only wheel-level concern. Already tracked in issues #15 and #23.
idna 3.11: PYSEC-2026-215 (CVE-2026-45409). Transitive via requests, not directly imported by NBI. Already tracked in issues #12, #16, #17.
pyjwt 2.7.0: 7 CVEs. System package (/usr/lib/python3/dist-packages), NOT an NBI dependency (not in pyproject.toml, Required-by is empty). NBI does not import jwt. Not actionable from NBI.
pip 24.0, setuptools 68.1.2, wheel 0.42.0: Build/system tools. Not NBI runtime dependencies. Not imported by NBI code. System-level updates only.
urllib3: pyproject.toml pins >=2.7.0 which resolves CVE-2026-44431 and CVE-2026-44432. Confirmed 2.7.0 at runtime.

npm deps: yarn audit 0 vulnerabilities. Previous osv-scanner findings (lodash, ws, fast-uri, postcss, @babel/runtime) tracked in existing issues #10/#14/#20 (lodash), #11/#21 (ws), #22/#29 (fast-uri), #25 (postcss), #19 (@babel/runtime). No PRs filed for any.
jupyter_server bump to 2.20.0 tracked in issue #24. jupyter_server 2.20.0 is available on PyPI; existing pin >=2.18.0 already picks it up. Consider bumping lower bound to >=2.20.0.

Pass A (2026-07-02): No new dependency CVEs found. All previously tracked issues (#10/#11/#12/#14/#15/#16/#17/#19/#20/#21/#22/#23/#24/#25/#29) remain open. yarn audit failed (registry errors); pip-audit confirmed same CVE set as prior scan. No fix PRs merged since last scan.
